auth.description: Enter your credentials to access your workspace.

layout.previewEmpty: Use the AI assistant to generate courses, reports, or lists. The content will appear here.
layout.agentGreeting: Hello. I am your AI assistant. I can help manage students, create courses, or prepare reports.
layout.agentCommunicationError: Sorry, I encountered an error communicating with the server.
layout.agentTimeout: Request timed out. The server took too long to respond.

account.overviewDescription: Complete view of your account, role, institution and active access.
account.renewalsDescription: Track renewals, plans and upcoming deadlines.
account.securityDescription: Control MFA, account status and security settings.
account.sessionsDescription: Review active sessions and recent activity.
account.contactDescription: Manage the contact details used by TeducAI.
account.paymentMethodsDescription: Configure Stripe, Djamo, CinetPay and Mobile Money.
account.creditDescription: Review your AI credits, balances and transactions.
account.invoicesDescription: Find your invoices, receipts and platform/school payments.
account.preferencesDescription: Choose theme, help preferences and language.
account.teamMembersDescription: View and manage team members according to permissions.
account.referDescription: Share TeducAI with an institution or colleague.
account.name: Name

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.description: Choose the payment method. Platform payments go to Thunderfam Group; school payments go to the institution account.
checkout.created: Payment created. You can follow its status in Invoices.
